EasyBuild test report for easybuilders/easybuild-easyconfigs PR(s) #25622

vtb-config — fuzzy finder for vtb device config (get/set). Wraps vtb's get-device-config/set-device-config commands with an interactive fzf picker so you can search, preview, and update camera config keys without knowing their exact names. Supports both old (rich schema with type/desc/constraints) and new (uuid-wrapped scalar) response formats. In set mode, smart input: bool keys get a true/false picker, enums list possible values, ranged types show min/max bounds. After a write, re-fetches to confirm the value landed. Requires fzf (https://github.com/junegunn/fzf — a general-purpose command-line fuzzy finder, install via 'brew install fzf') and jq (https://jqlang.org — a lightweight command-line JSON processor, install via 'brew install jq').
Find all unique pairs in an integer array that sum to a target value. O(n) solution using a set for complement lookup and tuple normalization to handle duplicates.
